seo.title: Terms of Use – SSVID
seo.meta_description: Read SSVID's Terms of Use. Learn about user responsibilities, copyright compliance, and conditions for using our free online YouTube downloader.

sections.content: By accessing or using SSVID (ssvid.cc), you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use the website.

SSVID is a free online tool that allows users to process publicly available video links and download content for offline viewing. SSVID does not host, upload, store, or distribute any video or audio files.

SSVID is intended for personal and non-commercial use only. Users may use the service to download content for personal offline viewing, study, or educational purposes, provided that such use complies with applicable laws.

Users are solely responsible for how they use SSVID and any content downloaded through the service. Users must ensure that their actions comply with copyright laws and the terms of service of the original content platform.

Users are strictly prohibited from using SSVID to download content that infringes copyright, violates intellectual property rights, or breaches applicable laws. SSVID respects copyright laws and expects users to do the same.
SSVID does not store, archive, or retain any downloaded files. All processing is temporary and files are delivered directly to the user's device without being saved on SSVID servers.
By using SSVID, you confirm that you are at least 13 years old (or the minimum legal age required in your jurisdiction).

SSVID strives to keep the service available and functioning properly. However, the service is provided on an "as-is" and "as-available" basis. We do not guarantee uninterrupted access, error-free operation, or permanent availability.

SSVID shall not be held liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use the service, including but not limited to data loss or service interruptions.
SSVID reserves the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time without prior notice.
We may update these Terms of Use from time to time. Any changes will be effective immediately upon being posted on this page.
These Terms of Use are governed by general principles of law without reference to any specific jurisdiction.

If you have any questions regarding these Terms of Use, please contact us at:
Email: contact.ssvidcc@gmail.com
